meaning: n.绗簩浠ｆ棩瑁旂編鍥戒汉
examples: But Nisei was a professional, and he specialized in such tea utensils as caddies and incense jars.
In fact, he is seen in Japan as one of the two greatest potters of the 17th century, the other being Nomomura Nisei.
Inouye was a member of the famed 442nd Regimental Combat Team made up of Nisei, second-generation Japanese-Americans from Hawaii and the Mainland.
